synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2781 Important: Oracle Linux 9 nodejs:24 security update
description:
nodejs
[1:24.13.0-1]
- Update to version 24.13.0

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.3-3]
- Keep BR on just npm

[3.0.3-2]
- Fix BR for nodejs-npm

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-6]
- Properly handle @group/package deps in nodejs-symlink-deps
  Resolves: RHEL-121581

[2021.06-5]
- nodejs.req to properly detect bundled deps
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2781

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2781.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:

Description of changes:

nodejs
[1:24.13.0-1]
- Update to version 24.13.0

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.3-3]
- Keep BR on just npm

[3.0.3-2]
- Fix BR for nodejs-npm

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-6]
- Properly handle @group/package deps in nodejs-symlink-deps
  Resolves: RHEL-121581

[2021.06-5]
- nodejs.req to properly detect bundled deps
